svg.text: General channel lifespan leaf collision probability
Poisson arrival model with one new storage key per minute on average.
P(collision by day t) = 1 - exp(-mu) * (1 + mu / 2^d)^(2^d), where mu = 1440t. Y axis is logarithmic.
Probability of at least one leaf collision by that time (log scale)
The zero-probability point at day 0 is clamped to the 1e-8 floor for log-scale rendering.
